diff --git a/src/queryweave/parser/parser.py b/src/queryweave/parser/parser.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..296b580
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/queryweave/parser/parser.py
@@ -0,0 +1,733 @@
+"""Recursive descent parser for QueryWeave SQL dialect."""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from queryweave.parser.lexer import Lexer, Token, TokenStream, TokenType
+from queryweave.parser.ast_nodes import (
+    AggregateExpr,
+    AliasExpr,
+    Assignment,
+    BetweenExpr,
+    BinaryExpr,
+    CaseExpr,
+    ColumnDef,
+    ColumnRef,
+    CreateTableStmt,
+    DeleteStmt,
+    DropTableStmt,
+    ExistsExpr,
+    Expression,
+    FrameBound,
+    FunctionCall,
+    GroupByClause,
+    HavingClause,
+    InExpr,
+    InsertStmt,
+    IsNullExpr,
+    JoinClause,
+    LikeExpr,
+    LimitClause,
+    LiteralExpr,
+    Node,
+    OrderByClause,
+    OrderByItem,
+    SelectStmt,
+    StarExpr,
+    SubqueryExpr,
+    TableRef,
+    UnaryExpr,
+    UnionStmt,
+    UpdateStmt,
+    WhenClause,
+    WhereClause,
+    WindowExpr,
+    WindowFrame,
+)
+
+_AGGREGATE_FUNCS = {"COUNT", "SUM", "AVG", "MIN", "MAX"}
+
+
+class ParseError(Exception):
+    """Raised on syntax errors during parsing."""
+
+    def __init__(self, message: str, token: Token | None = None) -> None:
+        self.token = token
+        loc = f" at L{token.line}:{token.col}" if token else ""
+        super().__init__(f"Parse error{loc}: {message}")
+
+
+class Parser:
+    """Recursive descent SQL parser."""
+
+    def __init__(self, lexer_or_stream: Lexer | TokenStream) -> None:
+        if isinstance(lexer_or_stream, Lexer):
+            tokens = lexer_or_stream.tokenize()
+            self._stream = TokenStream(tokens)
+        else:
+            self._stream = lexer_or_stream
+
+    def parse_statement(self) -> Node:
+        """Parse a single statement."""
+        tok = self._stream.current()
+        match tok.type:
+            case TokenType.SELECT:
+                stmt = self._parse_select()
+                return self._maybe_union(stmt)
+            case TokenType.INSERT:
+                return self._parse_insert()
+            case TokenType.UPDATE:
+                return self._parse_update()
+            case TokenType.DELETE:
+                return self._parse_delete()
+            case TokenType.CREATE:
+                return self._parse_create()
+            case TokenType.DROP:
+                return self._parse_drop()
+            case _:
+                raise ParseError(f"Unexpected token {tok.value!r}", tok)
+
+    def _maybe_union(self, left: SelectStmt) -> SelectStmt | UnionStmt:
+        if not self._stream.check(TokenType.UNION):
+            return left
+        self._stream.advance()
+        all_flag = self._stream.match(TokenType.ALL) is not None
+        right_select = self._parse_select()
+        right = self._maybe_union(right_select)
+        return UnionStmt(left=left, right=right, all=all_flag)
+
+    def _parse_select(self) -> SelectStmt:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.SELECT)
+
+        distinct = self._stream.match(TokenType.DISTINCT) is not None
+        columns = self._parse_select_list()
+        from_table = None
+        joins: list[JoinClause] = []
+        where = None
+        group_by = None
+        having = None
+        order_by = None
+        limit = None
+
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.FROM):
+            from_table = self._parse_table_ref()
+            joins = self._parse_joins()
+
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.WHERE):
+            where = self._parse_where()
+
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.GROUP_BY):
+            group_by = self._parse_group_by()
+
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.HAVING):
+            having = self._parse_having()
+
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.ORDER_BY):
+            order_by = self._parse_order_by()
+
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.LIMIT):
+            limit = self._parse_limit()
+
+        self._stream.match(TokenType.SEMICOLON)
+
+        return SelectStmt(
+            columns=columns,
+            from_table=from_table,
+            joins=joins,
+            where=where,
+            group_by=group_by,
+            having=having,
+            order_by=order_by,
+            limit=limit,
+            distinct=distinct,
+        )
+
+    def _parse_select_list(self) -> list[Expression]:
+        items: list[Expression] = []
+        items.append(self._parse_select_item())
+        while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+            items.append(self._parse_select_item())
+        return items
+
+    def _parse_select_item(self) -> Expression:
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.STAR):
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return StarExpr()
+
+        expr = self._parse_expression()
+
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.AS):
+            alias_tok = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER)
+            return AliasExpr(expr=expr, alias=alias_tok.value)
+
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.IDENTIFIER) and not self._is_keyword_ahead():
+            alias_tok = self._stream.advance()
+            return AliasExpr(expr=expr, alias=alias_tok.value)
+
+        return expr
+
+    def _is_keyword_ahead(self) -> bool:
+        tok = self._stream.current()
+        return tok.type in (
+            TokenType.FROM, TokenType.WHERE, TokenType.GROUP_BY,
+            TokenType.ORDER_BY, TokenType.HAVING, TokenType.LIMIT,
+            TokenType.JOIN, TokenType.LEFT, TokenType.RIGHT,
+            TokenType.INNER, TokenType.OUTER, TokenType.FULL,
+            TokenType.CROSS, TokenType.ON, TokenType.UNION,
+        )
+
+    def _parse_table_ref(self) -> TableRef:
+        name_tok = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER)
+        schema = None
+        name = name_tok.value
+
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.DOT):
+            schema = name
+            name = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER).value
+
+        alias = None
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.AS):
+            alias = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER).value
+        elif self._stream.check(TokenType.IDENTIFIER) and not self._is_keyword_ahead():
+            alias = self._stream.advance().value
+
+        return TableRef(name=name, alias=alias, schema=schema)
+
+    def _parse_joins(self) -> list[JoinClause]:
+        joins: list[JoinClause] = []
+        while True:
+            join_type = self._match_join_type()
+            if join_type is None:
+                break
+            table = self._parse_table_ref()
+            condition = None
+            if self._stream.match(TokenType.ON):
+                condition = self._parse_expression()
+            joins.append(JoinClause(join_type=join_type, table=table, condition=condition))
+        return joins
+
+    def _match_join_type(self) -> str | None:
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.INNER):
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.JOIN)
+            return "INNER"
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.LEFT):
+            self._stream.match(TokenType.OUTER)
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.JOIN)
+            return "LEFT"
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.RIGHT):
+            self._stream.match(TokenType.OUTER)
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.JOIN)
+            return "RIGHT"
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.FULL):
+            self._stream.match(TokenType.OUTER)
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.JOIN)
+            return "FULL"
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.CROSS):
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.JOIN)
+            return "CROSS"
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.JOIN):
+            return "INNER"
+        return None
+
+    def _parse_where(self) -> WhereClause:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.WHERE)
+        condition = self._parse_expression()
+        return WhereClause(condition=condition)
+
+    def _parse_group_by(self) -> GroupByClause:
+        columns: list[Expression] = []
+        columns.append(self._parse_expression())
+        while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+            columns.append(self._parse_expression())
+        return GroupByClause(columns=columns)
+
+    def _parse_having(self) -> HavingClause:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.HAVING)
+        return HavingClause(condition=self._parse_expression())
+
+    def _parse_order_by(self) -> OrderByClause:
+        items: list[OrderByItem] = []
+        items.append(self._parse_order_item())
+        while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+            items.append(self._parse_order_item())
+        return OrderByClause(items=items)
+
+    def _parse_order_item(self) -> OrderByItem:
+        expr = self._parse_expression()
+        ascending = True
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.ASC):
+            ascending = True
+        elif self._stream.match(TokenType.DESC):
+            ascending = False
+        return OrderByItem(expr=expr, ascending=ascending)
+
+    def _parse_limit(self) -> LimitClause:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.LIMIT)
+        limit_tok = self._stream.expect(TokenType.NUMBER)
+        limit_val = int(limit_tok.value)
+        offset_val = 0
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.OFFSET):
+            offset_tok = self._stream.expect(TokenType.NUMBER)
+            offset_val = int(offset_tok.value)
+        return LimitClause(limit=limit_val, offset=offset_val)
+
+    def _parse_expression(self) -> Expression:
+        return self._parse_or()
+
+    def _parse_or(self) -> Expression:
+        left = self._parse_and()
+        while self._stream.match(TokenType.OR):
+            right = self._parse_and()
+            left = BinaryExpr(left=left, operator="OR", right=right)
+        return left
+
+    def _parse_and(self) -> Expression:
+        left = self._parse_not()
+        while self._stream.match(TokenType.AND):
+            right = self._parse_not()
+            left = BinaryExpr(left=left, operator="AND", right=right)
+        return left
+
+    def _parse_not(self) -> Expression:
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.NOT):
+            operand = self._parse_not()
+            return UnaryExpr(operator="NOT", operand=operand)
+        return self._parse_comparison()
+
+    def _parse_comparison(self) -> Expression:
+        left = self._parse_addition()
+
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.IS):
+            self._stream.advance()
+            negated = self._stream.match(TokenType.NOT) is not None

+
+        frame = None
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.ROWS, TokenType.RANGE):
+            frame = self._parse_window_frame()
+
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+        return WindowExpr(
+            function=func_expr,
+            partition_by=partition_by,
+            order_by=order_items,
+            frame=frame,
+        )
+
+    def _parse_window_frame(self) -> WindowFrame:
+        mode_tok = self._stream.advance()
+        mode = mode_tok.value.upper()
+        start = self._parse_frame_bound()
+        end = None
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.AND):
+            end = self._parse_frame_bound()
+        return WindowFrame(mode=mode, start=start, end=end)
+
+    def _parse_frame_bound(self) -> FrameBound:
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.UNBOUNDED):
+            if self._stream.match(TokenType.PRECEDING):
+                return FrameBound(bound_type="UNBOUNDED PRECEDING")
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.FOLLOWING)
+            return FrameBound(bound_type="UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING")
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.CURRENT):
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.ROW)
+            return FrameBound(bound_type="CURRENT ROW")
+        num_tok = self._stream.expect(TokenType.NUMBER)
+        offset = int(num_tok.value)
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.PRECEDING):
+            return FrameBound(bound_type="N PRECEDING", offset=offset)
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.FOLLOWING)
+        return FrameBound(bound_type="N FOLLOWING", offset=offset)
+
+    def _parse_primary(self) -> Expression:
+        tok = self._stream.current()
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.NUMBER:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return LiteralExpr(value=int(tok.value), literal_type="integer")
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.FLOAT:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return LiteralExpr(value=float(tok.value), literal_type="float")
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.STRING:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return LiteralExpr(value=tok.value, literal_type="string")
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.TRUE:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return LiteralExpr(value=True, literal_type="boolean")
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.FALSE:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return LiteralExpr(value=False, literal_type="boolean")
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.NULL:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return LiteralExpr(value=None, literal_type="null")
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.EXISTS:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.LPAREN)
+            subquery = self._parse_select()
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+            return ExistsExpr(subquery=SubqueryExpr(query=subquery))
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.CASE:
+            return self._parse_case()
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.STAR:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            return StarExpr()
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.LPAREN:
+            self._stream.advance()
+            if self._stream.check(TokenType.SELECT):
+                sub = self._parse_select()
+                self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+                return SubqueryExpr(query=sub)
+            expr = self._parse_expression()
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+            return expr
+
+        if tok.type == TokenType.IDENTIFIER:
+            return self._parse_identifier_expr()
+
+        raise ParseError(f"Unexpected token {tok.value!r}", tok)
+
+    def _parse_case(self) -> CaseExpr:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.CASE)
+        operand = None
+        if not self._stream.check(TokenType.WHEN):
+            operand = self._parse_expression()
+        when_clauses: list[WhenClause] = []
+        while self._stream.match(TokenType.WHEN):
+            condition = self._parse_expression()
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.THEN)
+            result = self._parse_expression()
+            when_clauses.append(WhenClause(condition=condition, result=result))
+        else_expr = None
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.ELSE):
+            else_expr = self._parse_expression()
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.END)
+        return CaseExpr(operand=operand, when_clauses=when_clauses, else_expr=else_expr)
+
+    def _parse_identifier_expr(self) -> Expression:
+        name_tok = self._stream.advance()
+        name = name_tok.value
+
+        if self._stream.check(TokenType.LPAREN):
+            return self._parse_function_call(name)
+
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.DOT):
+            if self._stream.check(TokenType.STAR):
+                self._stream.advance()
+                return StarExpr(table=name)
+            col_tok = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER)
+            return ColumnRef(name=col_tok.value, table=name)
+
+        return ColumnRef(name=name)
+
+    def _parse_function_call(self, name: str) -> Expression:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.LPAREN)
+        upper_name = name.upper()
+
+        if upper_name in _AGGREGATE_FUNCS:
+            distinct = self._stream.match(TokenType.DISTINCT) is not None
+            if self._stream.check(TokenType.STAR):
+                self._stream.advance()
+                self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+                return AggregateExpr(function=upper_name, arg=None, distinct=distinct)
+            arg = None
+            if not self._stream.check(TokenType.RPAREN):
+                arg = self._parse_expression()
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+            return AggregateExpr(function=upper_name, arg=arg, distinct=distinct)
+
+        args: list[Expression] = []
+        if not self._stream.check(TokenType.RPAREN):
+            args.append(self._parse_expression())
+            while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+                args.append(self._parse_expression())
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+        return FunctionCall(name=name, args=args)
+
+    def _parse_insert(self) -> InsertStmt:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.INSERT)
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.INTO)
+        table = self._parse_table_ref()
+        columns: list[str] = []
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.LPAREN):
+            columns.append(self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER).value)
+            while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+                columns.append(self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER).value)
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+
+        values: list[list[Expression]] = []
+        select_stmt = None
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.VALUES):
+            while True:
+                self._stream.expect(TokenType.LPAREN)
+                row = [self._parse_expression()]
+                while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+                    row.append(self._parse_expression())
+                self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+                values.append(row)
+                if not self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+                    break
+        elif self._stream.check(TokenType.SELECT):
+            select_stmt = self._parse_select()
+        else:
+            raise ParseError("Expected VALUES or SELECT in INSERT")
+
+        self._stream.match(TokenType.SEMICOLON)
+        return InsertStmt(table=table, columns=columns, values=values, select=select_stmt)
+
+    def _parse_update(self) -> UpdateStmt:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.UPDATE)
+        table = self._parse_table_ref()
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.SET)
+        assignments: list[Assignment] = []
+        assignments.append(self._parse_assignment())
+        while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+            assignments.append(self._parse_assignment())
+
+        where_clause = None
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.WHERE):
+            where_expr = self._parse_expression()
+            where_clause = WhereClause(condition=where_expr)
+
+        self._stream.match(TokenType.SEMICOLON)
+        return UpdateStmt(table=table, assignments=assignments, where=where_clause)
+
+    def _parse_assignment(self) -> Assignment:
+        col_name = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER).value
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.OPERATOR)
+        value = self._parse_expression()
+        return Assignment(column=col_name, value=value)
+
+    def _parse_delete(self) -> DeleteStmt:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.DELETE)
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.FROM)
+        table = self._parse_table_ref()
+        where_clause = None
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.WHERE):
+            where_expr = self._parse_expression()
+            where_clause = WhereClause(condition=where_expr)
+        self._stream.match(TokenType.SEMICOLON)
+        return DeleteStmt(table=table, where=where_clause)
+
+    def _parse_create(self) -> CreateTableStmt:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.CREATE)
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.TABLE)
+        if_not_exists = self._stream.match(TokenType.IDENTIFIER) and self._stream.current().value.upper() == "IF"
+        if if_not_exists:
+            self._stream.advance()  # consume IF
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER)  # NOT
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER)  # EXISTS
+            if_not_exists = True
+        else:
+            if_not_exists = False
+
+        table = self._parse_table_ref()
+        columns: list[ColumnDef] = []
+        if self._stream.match(TokenType.LPAREN):
+            columns.append(self._parse_column_def())
+            while self._stream.match(TokenType.COMMA):
+                columns.append(self._parse_column_def())
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.RPAREN)
+        self._stream.match(TokenType.SEMICOLON)
+        return CreateTableStmt(table=table, columns=columns, if_not_exists=if_not_exists)
+
+    def _parse_column_def(self) -> ColumnDef:
+        name = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER).value
+        data_type = self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER).value
+        nullable = True
+        primary_key = False
+        default = None
+
+        # This is a simplified handling, no constraints parsing
+
+        return ColumnDef(name=name, data_type=data_type, nullable=nullable, primary_key=primary_key, default=default)
+
+    def _parse_drop(self) -> DropTableStmt:
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.DROP)
+        self._stream.expect(TokenType.TABLE)
+        if_exists = self._stream.match(TokenType.IDENTIFIER) and self._stream.current().value.upper() == "IF"
+        if if_exists:
+            self._stream.advance()  # consume IF
+            self._stream.expect(TokenType.IDENTIFIER)  # EXISTS
+            if_exists = True
+        else:
+            if_exists = False
+        table = self._parse_table_ref()
+        self._stream.match(TokenType.SEMICOLON)
+        return DropTableStmt(table=table, if_exists=if_exists)
+
+
+def parse(query: str) -> Node:
+    return Parser(Lexer(query)).parse_statement()
